## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss the process of enriching and organizing webinar attendee data in a CRM system.](https://fathom.video/share/K4DypG-MosE51o-9YepK__66sQDkUmEY?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Used Clay and Enrich Contact workflows to enrich attendee data with details like LinkedIn profiles, job titles, and companies](https://fathom.video/share/K4DypG-MosE51o-9YepK__66sQDkUmEY?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)
  - [Imported the enriched data into a CRM list, updating existing records](https://fathom.video/share/K4DypG-MosE51o-9YepK__66sQDkUmEY?tab=summary&timestamp=1767.0)
  - [Also imported Zoom webinar attendance data into the CRM](https://fathom.video/share/K4DypG-MosE51o-9YepK__66sQDkUmEY?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)
  - [Next steps are to clean up data issues, create custom fields/views, and implement lead status tracking](https://fathom.video/share/K4DypG-MosE51o-9YepK__66sQDkUmEY?tab=summary&timestamp=2259.0)

## Topics

### Data Enrichment Process

  - [Exported webinar registrant list with basic name/email data](https://fathom.video/share/K4DypG-MosE51o-9YepK__66sQDkUmEY?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Used Clay's Enrich Contact workflow to add details like LinkedIn, job title, company](https://fathom.video/share/K4DypG-MosE51o-9YepK__66sQDkUmEY?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)
  - [Handled errors where data couldn't be found](https://fathom.video/share/K4DypG-MosE51o-9YepK__66sQDkUmEY?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
  - [Imported enriched data back into CRM as a new list, updating existing records](https://fathom.video/share/K4DypG-MosE51o-9YepK__66sQDkUmEY?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)

### Webinar Attendance Data

  - [Downloaded report of actual webinar attendees from Zoom](https://fathom.video/share/K4DypG-MosE51o-9YepK__66sQDkUmEY?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)
  - [Imported attendance data like attendance duration into the CRM list](https://fathom.video/share/K4DypG-MosE51o-9YepK__66sQDkUmEY?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Allowed mapping "Yes" values to checkboxes](https://fathom.video/share/K4DypG-MosE51o-9YepK__66sQDkUmEY?tab=summary&timestamp=2106.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Clean up unnamed companies and other data quality issues](https://fathom.video/share/K4DypG-MosE51o-9YepK__66sQDkUmEY?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [Create custom "lead status" field to track lead stages](https://fathom.video/share/K4DypG-MosE51o-9YepK__66sQDkUmEY?tab=summary&timestamp=2269.0)
  - [Set up filtered views to see leads by status, company, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/K4DypG-MosE51o-9YepK__66sQDkUmEY?tab=summary&timestamp=2240.0)
  - [Discuss full lead qualification and nurture workflow](https://fathom.video/share/K4DypG-MosE51o-9YepK__66sQDkUmEY?tab=summary&timestamp=2307.0)
